entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `imageUri` TEXT)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `tripId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `position` INTEGER NOT NULL, `arrivalDateTime` TEXT, `departureDateTime` TEXT)

indices.name: index_destinations_tripId_position
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_destinations_tripId_position` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tripId`, `position`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `destinationId` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`destinationId`) REFERENCES `destinations`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_transports_destinationId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_transports_destinationId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`destinationId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `transportId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `position` INTEGER NOT NULL, `stopName` TEXT, `company` TEXT, `flightNumber` TEXT, `reservationConfirmationNumber` TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(`transportId`) REFERENCES `transports`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_transport_legs_transportId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_transport_legs_transportId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`transportId`)
